description: The 'UI for the things humans release' — shared SwiftUI package (proposed slug `release-artifact-viewer-components`) with one viewer per artifact kind we've schematized. Initial set: PrivacyDisclosureReleaseView (renders the disclosure as an App-Store-nutrition-label-shaped preview), BaselineCapabilityReceiptView (tier-tinted checklist with status badges per capability), SecretLabsReceiptView (NPS gauge + blocker count + themes summary), EngineeringReviewReceiptView (criteria-with-findings list, kind-tagged), GitHubOrgDecisionView (compact card showing org slug + requiresNewOrg + rationale), ExpectedReachMetricsView (DAU/MAU/install-base with confidence-tier badge), and a generic FallbackArtifactView for kinds without a dedicated viewer. Each view takes the Codable artifact directly + an optional `mode: .compact | .full | .preview`. Consumed by release-verification-ui-package above the verification button. Per-app embedders pick which viewers to surface via a `[ReleaseOperationArtifactKind: any View]` registry.
resolutionNote: Shipped 2026-05-15 as `WrkstrmReleaseArtifactUI` SwiftUI package at `private/universal/substrate/collectives/wrkstrm-components/private/release-artifact-ui/spm/wrkstrm-release-artifact-ui/`. 7 viewers (PrivacyDisclosureReleaseView, BaselineCapabilityReceiptView, SecretLabsReceiptView, EngineeringReviewReceiptView, GitHubOrgDecisionView, ExpectedReachMetricsView, FallbackArtifactView) + ArtifactViewerMode enum (compact/preview/full). 9/9 instantiation tests pass; build green first try across 5 cross-package schema deps via SPM_USE_LOCAL_DEPS pattern. Workspace addition under wrkstrm-components. Unblocks release-verification-ui-package.
title: Build release-artifact-viewer-components: per-artifact-type SwiftUI views for what humans verify
